title: Context Definition File
description: Defines a context (e.g., user properties, theme context) with its properties and supported operations. Each file contains exactly one context as the root key.

context_properties.title: Context Properties
context_properties.description: Map of property definitions for this context. Keys are property names, values are parameter definitions with operations.

oneOf.title: Simple Type
oneOf.description: Shorthand: just the type name. Append '?' for nullable.

oneOf.title: Full Property Definition
oneOf.description: Full property definition with type, description, validation, and operations.
